channel.title: Ansible on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Ansible on Validated Patterns

item.title: Introducing "Bootstrap" Secrets
item.description: Validated Patterns now includes the idea of "bootstrap" secrets that will be injected directly into your cluster during the secrets loading process.

item.title: AGOF v2
item.description: New features and options available in AGOF for Version 2
